summary: The workflow failed when attempting to push a branch to GitHub. The git push command returned HTTP 403 Forbidden, indicating missing or invalid authentication credentials for accessing the repository.
root_cause: GitHub Actions workflow lacks valid authentication credentials or sufficient permissions to push to the repository. The git push command failed with HTTP 403 Forbidden error.

evidence.quote: fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/': The requested URL returned error: 403
evidence.reason: Explicit HTTP 403 Forbidden error indicates the workflow cannot authenticate to GitHub, either due to missing credentials or insufficient permissions

evidence.quote: Error: Command failed with exit code 128 (Unknown system error -128): git push origin update/react/19.3.0-canary-142cfde8-20260422
evidence.reason: The git push command to create the pull request branch failed with exit code 128, which is a generic git error typically used for authentication/access failures

suggested_fix: Configure GitHub authentication credentials for the workflow: ensure GITHUB_TOKEN or equivalent git credentials with write access to the repository are properly configured before the git push command executes.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
